bio_panel.name: Lewis Farrell
bio_panel.title: Consultant · Intimacy Economist
bio_panel.bio: I design data systems for organisations. I study relationships as systems — shaped by incentives, strategy, and human behaviour.

professional_panel.title: Strategy & Systems
professional_panel.description: I design and deliver data systems — spanning strategy, architecture, and implementation — to drive measurable organisational change.

affinity_section.heading: Affinity
affinity_section.text: A decision system for clearer thinking in dating and relationships.
affinity_section.tagline: Better decisions come from understanding the incentives behind them.
affinity_section.description: Affinity helps you interpret your dating experiences through structure — mapping preferences, constraints, and behavioural patterns to improve how you choose and act.
features: Insight from behavioural patterns over time
Applied thinking for real dating situations
